code: import api from'./client';export async function triggerSOS(payload){const{data}=await api.post('/sos/trigger',payload);return data;}export async function fetchMySOSHistory(){const{data}=await api.get('/sos/my');return Array.isArray(data)?data:[];}export async function fetchAdminAlerts(){const{data}=await api.get('/admin/alerts');return Array.isArray(data)?data:[];}
